name: gsd-computer-use
description: Independent self-hosted macOS Computer Use plugin with local screenshots, accessibility tree inspection, and OS-level input control.

interface.shortDescription: Self-hosted Mac app control from Codex
interface.longDescription: An independent self-hosted Computer Use implementation for macOS. It exposes local MCP tools for app state capture, accessibility tree inspection, mouse and keyboard actions, scrolling, setting values, and invoking accessibility actions. It does not launch or wrap any bundled native plugin. Screenshots and app metadata stay on the local machine unless the calling agent chooses to include them in its own responses.
defaultPrompt: Inspect Safari and summarize the visible page
Click the selected button in Finder
Type a short note into the active app
